subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, but time is lacking. Nevertheless, I am occupied with thy remembrance and give thee the glad-tidings of steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید ولی فرصت مفقود با وجود این بذکرت مشغولم مژده ثبوت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @firmness in the Covenant, @the concourse on high
